template.topic: Full topic string for this payload
template.time: Unix epoch milliseconds when the payload is issued

<client_id>/<topic_ns>/REQUEST.summary: Requests for interface actions (actual runtime topic)

<client_id>/<topic_ns>/RESPONSE.summary: Responses for interface actions (actual runtime topic)

<client_id>/<topic_ns>/STATE/<field>.data: Schema-shaped payload. Single-field states use named field objects (e.g. {"IsArmed": true}); multi-field states publish all named fields directly.

<client_id>/<topic_ns>/EVENT/<field>.summary: Event stream for occurrence notifications (actual runtime topic)
<client_id>/<topic_ns>/EVENT/<field>.data: Schema-shaped event payload published immediately and not retained as latest state.

DIAG/<client_id>/<topic_ns>.summary: Diagnostics and health events, ie startup, crash, shutdown, errors
